# defectdojo_credential_mapping (Resource)

DefectDojo Credential Mapping

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "defectdojo_credential_mapping" "example" {
  cred_id = 1
  product = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cred_id` (Number) The ID of the Credential.

### Optional

- `engagement` (Number) The ID of the Engagement to map the credential to.
- `finding` (Number) The ID of the Finding to map the credential to.
- `is_authn_provider` (Boolean) Whether this is an authentication provider.
- `product` (Number) The ID of the Product to map the credential to.
- `test` (Number) The ID of the Test to map the credential to.
- `url` (String) URL associated with the credential mapping.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import defectdojo_credential_mapping.example 123
```
